name: J-Grants MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Digital Agency Japan (digital-go-jp org) for J-Grants — Japan's national government grant and subsidy portal. Enables AI agents to search and query Japanese government grants, subsidies, and public funding opportunities through the official J-Grants database API.
use_cases: Searching Japanese government grants and subsidies from business support agents
Querying J-Grants database for matching funding opportunities from advisory agents
Building grant application assistance tools using official government grant data
Integrating Japan public funding search into small business support AI workflows
not_for: Non-Japanese entities (J-Grants is Japan government grants only)
best_when: A Japanese business, startup, or advisor wants AI agents to search official Japanese government grant and subsidy databases — finding relevant public funding opportunities through J-Grants.
avoid_when: You're looking for non-Japanese grants, or need to submit applications programmatically. J-Grants MCP is a search/discovery tool for Japan's grant database.

auth.notes: J-Grants API key may be required. API access via official Japanese government portal. Review registration requirements on j-grants-portal.go.jp.

pricing.free_tier_limits: J-Grants API is a public government service
pricing.notes: J-Grants is a Japanese government public service. MCP server is free open source from digital-go-jp (Digital Agency Japan).

performance.rate_limits: Government API rate limits; typically modest for public services

known_agent_gotchas: Documentation and API responses primarily in Japanese — agents need Japanese language capability
Official from Digital Agency Japan (digital-go-jp) — high quality government digital team
Grant data updates on government schedule — may not reflect real-time availability
API registration may require Japanese business registration details
agent_readiness.security_notes: Official Japanese government API. HTTPS. Government data residency in Japan. Public grant database — no sensitive data in queries.

security_score_components.security_notes: Official Japanese government service. HTTPS enforced. Public grant database data.
